HRT.name: Hortus Station
HRT._note: Keplerian model validated 2026-06-26 from 8 departure-position observations. omega_rad_s=-1.129367e-5 is near-apoapsis angular rate; n_rad_s=1.2982e-5 is mean motion (derived from angular momentum). e=0.0708 cuts +10.5h XY error from 315k km (circular) to 90k km (Keplerian). PROVISIONAL: e, a_km, n_rad_s, t_peri_s, theta_peri_rad derived from apoapsis-region data only — validate against flight exports captured ~3 days from t_ref_s=1782384761 to confirm periapsis parameters.
